note: seq=4 (queue): automated daily Postgres backup. Fetch+sha-verify scripts/atlas_backup.py; install atlas-backup.service+timer (daily 03:30, Persistent); run one immediate disk-aware pg_dump (custom/compressed) of tuanichat_atlas -> /opt/atlas/backups/, pg_restore --list verify, retain 7. Fail-loud: a failed/unverifiable dump fails the apply and rolls back. PLACEHOLDER seq=4 -- renumber to last_seq+1 when you publish (must come after atlas.business exists, i.e. after seq-3).

steps.note: seq=4: install daily pg_dump backup + immediate verified proof run

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/backups/atlas_backup.py':'47832f3ad51dae46e4c122bde85bb937cda5f97fd0db12eb1a1a10af3409b11a'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS daily Postgres backup (pg_dump custom format)
After=postgresql.service network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/backups/atlas_backup.py --verify
Nice=10
IOSchedulingClass=idle
TimeoutStartSec=4h

[Unit]
Description=Run ATLAS Postgres backup daily

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*-*-* 03:30:00
Persistent=true
AccuracySec=1min
RandomizedDelaySec=300
Unit=atlas-backup.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
